name: OpenClaw Capital Radar live state
notes: Primary internal freshness and source-coverage state. Does not by itself support investment recommendations.

name: FRED public macro series
notes: Primary macro source for rates, credit, liquidity, and inflation series used by the radar.

name: Yahoo Finance chart endpoint
notes: Used for market tape and price/performance data. Requires coverage checks and should not be used as sole thesis evidence.

name: SEC EDGAR 10-K / 10-Q annual and quarterly filings
notes: Authoritative source for audited financials, management guidance, and risk disclosures. Requires human to navigate to specific accession number and verify figures before treating as decision-grade.
